pi_items.source: All three PDB files downloaded from https://files.rcsb.org/download/{ID}.pdb. 1IEP: 434565 bytes, ABL kinase + imatinib (STI). 1M17: 252720 bytes, EGFR kinase + erlotinib (AQ4). 1FIN: 817776 bytes, CDK2 + Cyclin A + ATP.
export_result.sh line 37 writes JSON to this exact path. Verified by running export script in live environment.
Consistent across task.json description, setup_task.sh (stale delete), and export_result.sh (existence check). Verified directory exists and is writable by ga user in live environment.
Consistent across task.json description, setup_task.sh (stale delete), and export_result.sh (existence check). Verified writable by ga user in live environment.
A single-structure 800x600 ray trace produced 140837 bytes in live testing. A 3-structure 2400x1800 ray trace will far exceed 50000 bytes. Threshold is reasonable.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses three real PDB structures downloaded from RCSB. CRITICAL DATA QUIRK: PDB 1M17 (EGFR) uses non-canonical residue numbering with a -24 offset from standard EGFR numbering. The EGFR gatekeeper is at residue T766 in PDB 1M17 (not T790 as in literature). The DFG motif in EGFR is D831-F832-G833 (not D855-F856-G857). Structure details: ABL (1IEP) has chains A,B with STI (imatinib) ligand, residue range 225-498, gatekeeper T315, DFG motif D381-F382-G383, DFG-OUT conformation (imatinib is a Type II inhibitor), catalytic lysine K271, C-helix glutamate E286, K271_NZ to E286_OE1 distance 3.10 Angstroms, gatekeeper_CA to DFG-Phe_CA distance 11.73 Angstroms. EGFR (1M17) has chain A only with AQ4 (erlotinib) ligand, residue range 672-995, gatekeeper T766 (canonical T790), DFG D831-F832-G833, DFG-IN conformation (erlotinib is Type I), catalytic lysine K721 (canonical K745), C-helix glutamate E738 (canonical E762), K721_NZ to E738_OE1 3.56 Angstroms, gatekeeper_CA to DFG-Phe_CA 12.71 Angstroms. CDK2 (1FIN) has chains A,C (CDK2 kinase) and B,D (Cyclin A), with ATP ligand, gatekeeper F80, DFG D145-F146-G147, DFG-IN, catalytic lysine K33, C-helix glutamate E51, K33_NZ to E51_OE1 3.58 Angstroms, gatekeeper_CA to DFG-Phe_CA 12.06 Angstroms. Pairwise RMSD values from PyMOL super command on chain A CA atoms: ABL-EGFR 1.19 Angstroms (196 atoms), ABL-CDK2 1.35 Angstroms (188 atoms), EGFR-CDK2 1.71 Angstroms (202 atoms). ABL chain A has 83 pocket residues within 5 Angstroms of STI. EGFR chain A has 103 pocket residues within 5 Angstroms of AQ4. Imatinib selectivity for ABL is primarily due to its binding to the DFG-out conformation (which EGFR and CDK2 do not adopt in these structures) and specific contacts with the DFG loop residues that differ between ABL and EGFR/CDK2.
